'''hatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:byemby|byemby]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-t-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:byemby|byemby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hatate|hatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hatatesher|hatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hatatesherĂ«m|hatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hatatero|hatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hatateshĂ«|hatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hatateshĂ«m|hatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihatatero|gokihatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihatateshĂ«|gokihatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihatateshĂ«m|gokihatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohatankerom|gohatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohatankeshĂ«|gohatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohatankeshĂ«m|gohatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohatankeya|gohatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hataterom|hataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hatatemu|hatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hatateya|hatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihataterom|gokihataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihatatemu|gokihatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihatateya|gokihatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hatatate|hatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hatatatesher|hatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hatatatesherĂ«m|hatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hatatatero|hatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hatatateshĂ«|hatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hatatateshĂ«m|hatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihatatatero|gokihatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihatatateshĂ«|gokihatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihatatateshĂ«m|gokihatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohatatankerom|gohatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohatatankeshĂ«|gohatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohatatankeshĂ«m|gohatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohatatankeya|gohatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hatataterom|hatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hatatatemu|hatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hatatateya|hatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihatataterom|gokihatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihatatatemu|gokihatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihatatateya|gokihatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠtĂŠte|hĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠtĂŠtesher|hĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠtĂŠtero|hĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠtĂŠtero|gokihĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠtĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠtĂŠterom|hĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠtĂŠtemu|hĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠtĂŠteya|hĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠtĂŠterom|gokihĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠtĂŠteya|gokihĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:haftafte|haftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:haftaftesher|haftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:haftaftesherĂ«m|haftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:haftaftero|haftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:haftafteshĂ«|haftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:haftafteshĂ«m|haftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihaftaftero|gokihaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihaftafteshĂ«|gokihaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihaftafteshĂ«m|gokihaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohaftafnkerom|gohaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohaftafnkeshĂ«|gohaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohaftafnkeshĂ«m|gohaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohaftafnkeya|gohaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:haftafterom|haftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:haftaftemu|haftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:haftafteya|haftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihaftafterom|gokihaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihaftaftemu|gokihaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihaftafteya|gokihaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
